package rulecoverage

func NegativeGoPerfLayerErrorHandlingCostErrorsWrapInTightLoop() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_error_handling_cost_errors_wrap_in_tight_loop"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Layer: Error handling cost. Flag repeated error wrapping inside loops where one aggregated context would be cheaper."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
